name: job.application.ops
description: Runs job-search operations for Athena: fit checks, ATS-aware resume/cover-letter drafting, app tracking, and approval-gated recruiter outreach.

message.description: Job listing, recruiter message, or application workflow request.

examples: tailor my resume for this GRC analyst job
draft a follow-up to this recruiter
purpose: Operate Osman's job-search workflow: screen listings, decide Apply/Maybe/Skip, tailor ATS resume angles, prepare cover letters and recruiter follow-ups, and keep outreach or tracker updates approval-gated.
whenToUse: The user asks to score, screen, apply to, skip, track, or compare a job, internship, full-time role, SOC role, GRC role, risk role, IT support role, or cybersecurity role.
The request asks for ATS resume tailoring, cover letter positioning, recruiter follow-up, interview prep framing, or application tracking.
The request needs an Apply/Maybe/Skip recommendation, fit score, resume angle, missing skills, risks, and next step.
The role may involve internship vs full-time tradeoffs, start dates, student authorization, or sponsorship and should pair with the authorization guard.
The request includes outreach or sending but must remain approval-gated.
whenNotToUse: Do not use as the primary skill for a pure GRC/NIST/SOC 2/control-testing role screen when GRC Risk Role Screener is more specific.
Do not use as the primary skill for F-1/CPT/OPT/sponsorship legal-risk wording when Student Work Authorization Guard is more specific.
Do not use for generic writing polish with no job, recruiter, resume, cover letter, or application context.
Do not use to submit applications, send messages, create files, commit code, or update external systems without approval.
requiredContext: Role title, company, job description, location, employment type, and deadline if available.
User goal: apply, maybe, skip, tailor resume, draft follow-up, track status, or prepare interview answer.
Known constraints such as internship vs full-time, start date, sponsorship wording, school schedule, or location.
Confirmed background only: Security+, CySA+, IT/cyber/GRC/SOC targets, projects, and experience the system already knows or the user provides.
missingContextQuestions: What is the role title, company, and job description or listing text?
Are you trying to decide Apply/Maybe/Skip, tailor a resume, draft outreach, or track the application?
Is this internship, full-time, part-time, remote, hybrid, or on-site, and are there start-date constraints?
Do you want a fit score only or also a resume angle and next step?

outputContract.format: Apply/Maybe/Skip -> Fit score -> Why it fits -> Risks -> Resume angle -> Missing skills -> Next step -> Approval-gated draft if requested.
mustInclude: Why it fits Osman's Security+/CySA+ and target roles when relevant.
Risks or constraints including sponsorship, timing, seniority, location, or hard requirements.
Resume angle, missing skills, and next step.
mustAvoid: Do not invent employment history, degrees, certifications, projects, or application status.
Do not overstate experience with tools or frameworks.
Do not send recruiter outreach or submit applications.
Do not update external trackers or write files without approval.
Do not ignore a more specific GRC or work-authorization skill.

safetyRules: Use only confirmed user background or role text; do not invent credentials or experience.
Keep recruiter emails, cover letters, applications, tracker updates, and file writes approval-gated.
Flag work authorization or start-date risks and pair with Student Work Authorization Guard when needed.
Prefer realistic fit and targeted applications over generic optimism.
Do not expose private data, secrets, or raw account details.
approvalRequiredFor: Sending recruiter, hiring manager, school, or HR messages
Creating or updating cover letters, resumes, or files
Saving durable memory about job status or personal constraints
positiveExamples: Score this SOC analyst role and tell me Apply, Maybe, or Skip.
Tailor my resume angle for this GRC analyst job.
Draft a recruiter follow-up for this application.
Track this application as applied after I approve it.
This role looks interesting. Should I apply?
Can you help with this recruiter message?
Is this internship better than a full-time IT support role for me?
negativeExamples: What should HR say about an I-9 TNC notice?
Can I work off-campus before OPT starts?
Write a ticket note for a printer issue.

evaluationPrompts.input: Score this SOC analyst role and tell me Apply, Maybe, or Skip.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive job fit scoring with required output template.

evaluationPrompts.input: Tailor my resume angle for this GRC analyst job.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive ATS resume tailoring for a role.

evaluationPrompts.input: Draft a recruiter follow-up for my application.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive recruiter follow-up with approval gate.

evaluationPrompts.input: Track this application as applied after I approve it.
Is this internship better than a full-time IT support role for me?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive internship vs full-time career decision.

evaluationPrompts.input: What should HR do with an I-9 Section 2 receipt?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Negative I-9 compliance belongs to I-9 HR skill.

evaluationPrompts.input: Can I start off-campus before OPT is approved?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Negative student authorization is more specific.

evaluationPrompts.input: Write a customer-facing VPN ticket response.
This role looks interesting. Should I apply?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Ambiguous role screen; should ask for listing details.

evaluationPrompts.input: Can you help with this recruiter message?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Ambiguous recruiter/application request; needs message and goal.

evaluationPrompts.input: My internship asks if I need sponsorship and I want to apply.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Multi-skill: Job Application Ops should support Student Work Authorization Guard.
